response.justification: James has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Demonstrated full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — core required technologies
AI experience appears incidental rather than focused; lacks depth in production-grade GenAI system delivery
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment at staff level
